name: How to fix suspended Google My Business profile
description: Google is a trusted resource when searching for local businesses. Therefore, Google may suspend your Google My Business Profiles when they don't comply with their policies. This article will teach you Fixing a Google My Business profile that has been suspended
main_title: How to fix suspended Google My Business profile | Synup
richtext:
Many people consider Google a trusted resource when searching for local businesses. Therefore, most companies view their Google My Business listing as a valuable asset. A business profile offers a way for customers to find the company when they search online through various Google services, like Maps and Search. Thus, a suspension from Google My Business can severely impact the company's leads, revenue, and profits. 

Google strives to maintain the quality of its business listings to keep its user base engaged. For instance, the company publishes Google Business Profile Guidelines and expects businesses to read the rules and comply. Google suspends guideline violators for various reasons, commonly because of quality issues or inaccuracies. 

How to Reinstate Suspended Google My Business Listings

Businesses should not panic if local listings get suspended. Instead, they can follow straightforward steps to convince Google to reinstate listings. To file for reinstatement: 

  • Review Google's guidelines to find the violation. 
  • Log in to the company's business account and edit the profile to resolve the issue. 
  • Complete a Google My Business reinstatement form online. 

Essential tips include checking the accuracy of the business name, address, and phone number. Businesses should also complete their profile by adding an updated business description, photo, logo, and opening date. Also, make sure to choose the best categories. 

After verifying the basics, check the website address to ensure it opens on the right page. Google doesn't require photos, but images can improve quality scores and might help avoid suspensions in the future. Use high-quality, optimized images that adhere to Google's business photo standards, reflect well on the company, and offer searchers information they can use. 

How Long Does Google Take to Reinstate Business Profiles?

Google says its representatives will review reinstatement requests within three business days. If reinstatement takes longer than three days, contact support by replying to the original suspension email.
